name: openclaude-vscode
description: Sleek VS Code extension for OpenClaude with a visual Control Center and terminal-aligned theme.

openclaude.launchCommand.description: Command run in the integrated terminal when launching OpenClaude.

openclaude.terminalName.description: Integrated terminal tab name for OpenClaude sessions.

openclaude.useOpenAIShim.description: Optionally set CLAUDE_CODE_USE_OPENAI=1 in launched OpenClaude terminals.

openclaude.providerPreset.description: Optional launch preset. Use "codex" to start OpenClaude with the Codex backend and GPT-5.4 defaults.

openclaude.model.description: Optional OPENAI_MODEL override for launched OpenClaude terminals, for example gpt-5.4 or codexplan.

openclaude.baseUrl.description: Optional OPENAI_BASE_URL override for launched OpenClaude terminals.

openclaude.envFile.description: Optional env file loaded before launch. Supports ${workspaceFolder} and ~/. Example: ${workspaceFolder}/.env.openclaude

openclaude.firecrawlApiKey.description: Optional FIRECRAWL_API_KEY override to enable WebSearch/WebFetch outside native Codex search.

openclaude.codexApiKey.description: Optional CODEX_API_KEY override for Codex launches. Prefer using ~/.codex/auth.json when available.

openclaude.chatgptAccountId.description: Optional CHATGPT_ACCOUNT_ID override for Codex launches.

openclaude.codexAuthJsonPath.description: Optional path to a Codex auth.json file. Supports ${workspaceFolder} and ~/.

openclaude.extraEnv.description: Additional environment variables injected into launched OpenClaude terminals.

openclaude.requireWebSearch.description: Fail launch early when neither Codex native web search nor FIRECRAWL_API_KEY is available.
